titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Yusef Komunyakaa Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday August 7, 2018 at 22:43

did.unittitle: Yusef Komunyakaa papers

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Chris Calhoun Agency on the James Weldon Johnson Memorial Collection of Negro Arts & Letters Fund and the Edwin J. Beinecke Book Fund, 2014.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections as they are acquired, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
This collection received a basic level of processing, including rehousing and minimal organization.

Information included in the Description of Papers note and Collection Contents section is drawn from information supplied with the collection and from an initial survey of the contents. Folder titles appearing in the contents list below are often based on those provided by the creator or previous custodian. Titles have not been verified against the contents of the folders in all cases. Otherwise, folder titles are supplied by staff during initial processing.
This finding aid may be updated periodically to account for new acquisitions to the collection and/or revisions in arrangement and description.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
Box 48 (audiovisual materials): Restricted fragile material. Reference copies may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.
Box 49 (digital media): Restricted fragile material. Access copies of digital files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Yusef Komunyakaa Papers. James Weldon Johnson Collection in the Yale Collection of American Literature, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Yusef Komunyakaa is an African American poet and recipient of the 1994 Pulitzer Prize for poetry.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of writings, correspondence, writings of others, other papers, printed materials, audiovisual materials, and electronic media that document the life and work of African American poet Yusef Komunyakaa. The writings and correspondence are intermixed with writings of others and other papers that collectively document Komunyakaa's poetry, writings, teaching, and personal life. Printed materials include clippings, writings by Komunyakaa, and promotional materials. Audiovisual materials include audio and video recordings of Komunyakaa.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Organized into five series: I. Writings and Other Papers, 1930-2009. II. Correspondence and Other Papers, 1976-2014. III. Printed Materials, 1970s-2000s. IV. Audiovisual Materials, undated. V. Electronic Media, undated.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Yusef Komunyakaa Papers is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

did.unittitle: Writings and other papers
Holograph notes, drafts, correspondence, photographs, and other papers
Holograph notes, drafts, correspondence, and photographs
Holograph notes, drafts, correspondence, and printed material
Holograph notes, galley proofs, correspondence, teaching materials, and printed materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a proof of Talking Dirty to the Gods .

did.unittitle: Holograph notes, typescripts, drafts, and other papers
Typescripts, writings of others, and correspondence

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes drafts of Komunyakaa's Shangri-La , Blue Notes , and Thieves of Paradise . Also includes two pieces of mail art from Reetika Vazirani.

did.unittitle: Typescripts, holograph notes, drafts, writings of others, printed materials, correspondence, and other papers
Holograph notes and drafts
Holograph notes, drafts, typescripts, galley proofs, writings of others, and other papers

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes typescripts and galleys for Thieves of Paradise , Magic City , Dien Cai Dau , I Apologize for the Eyes in My Head , and Dream and Spleen: Uncollected Early Poems 1973-1976 .

did.unittitle: Holograph notes and drafts

Correspondence, clippings, printed materials, and other papers relating to academic events and publications and holograph notes and drafts
Academic and professional correspondence from Indiana University and Princeton
Correspondence and other papers, mostly relating to Komunyakaa's Pulitzer Prize
Professional and personal correspondence regarding events and academic service

Correspondence relating to events, travels, readings, appearances, and academic events, printed materials, and writings submitted by others for review
Correspondence relating to events, appearances, and academic events and printed materials

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes piano/vocal score for "Slip Knot" Opera with music by T.J. Anderson and libretto by Komunyakaa.
